struct_detail.product_summary:
Premium Soft PU Leather & Minimalist Style: Crafted from high-grade, eco-friendly soft leather glasses pouch material, this product offers a smooth, skin-like touch. The minimalist envelope design combined with trendy macaron colors makes it a hot-selling fashion eyewear accessory for boutique retailers and modern lifestyle brands.
Secure Metal Stud Closure for Quick Access: Featuring a durable and sleek metal buckle closure, this pouch ensures your frames are securely fastened while remaining incredibly easy to open. It is a highly efficient portable sunglasses protector that combines vintage charm with practical everyday functionality for on-the-go users.
Slim & Ultra-Lightweight Space Saver: Unlike traditional bulky hard shells, this slim glasses case features a flexible, flat-pack design. It fits effortlessly into small handbags or coat pockets, making it an ideal travel eyewear organizer. Its compact nature also helps eyewear wholesalers significantly reduce international logistics costs.
Comprehensive Anti-Scratch Protection: The interior is lined with a fine, non-abrasive material to keep lenses crystal clear and free from dust. This protective spectacle pouch is versatile enough to fit various styles, including large frame sunglasses, optical reading glasses, and blue light blocking frames.
Professional OEM/ODM & Private Label Support: We provide comprehensive customized glasses case solutions to elevate your business identity. From private label logo embossing to custom color selections, we offer low MOQ services to help eyewear brands and optical clinics enhance their professional market recognition.
struct_detail.company_summary:
Wika(Xiongda) company was established in 2004, located in Hebei province. We have developed a wide variety of products including glasses cases (ordinary iron box and hand box), handmade glasses cases, soft glasses bags, cleaning cloth, and eyewear pouches. Our factory covers an area of more than 10000 square meters. We have automatic iron glasses case production equipment, 2 standardized glasses cases production lines. Our monthly production capability reaches
300000 pieces for glasses cases.
Our factory have BSCI and ISO9001 certificates. We supply millions products to Walmart and Disney company in the world.
We have over 15 years experience on producing glasses packaging products. On one hand, we offer different logo printing
for choosing, including heat transferal printing, silk printing, embossing printing, hot stamping, and embroidery logo. The other hand, we pursuit the novel design and produce over 20 sorts new products every year to meet the new demand of our customers. Besides we provide a great many cover materials, such as genuine leather, artificial leather, PU, PVC and textile. Based on this,
we can customize products according to your requirements. what's more, we have set up a full line inspection product to ensure that our products are high quality. There is no doubt that we can provide customers with high quality products, prompt samples service and punctual delivery for mass production based on strict management and quality control and strong technical support.
Welcome to visit our factory and feel free to contact with us
